title: Goodyear Professional Car Detailing Scrubber Brush | 4 Heads | Internal and External Cleaning | Dashboard | Alloys | Hard to Reach Gaps
availability_text: Only 5 left in stock (more on the way).
features: Goodyear Professional Car Detailing Cleaning Brush with 4 Interchangeable Heads

High-powered sonic vibration motor for thorough and rapid cleaning, allowing professional car detailing at home The sonic vibrations help release the dirt from nooks and crannies, giving you that professional car showroom clean making your car look like it's just come from the showroom ! Long handle for difficult to reach areas, such as in-between the seats, within cupholders and nooks/crannies throughout the car

4 brush heads for speciality cleaning, we've thought of every part of the car, you can use this kit to clean both inside and outside the car where you can't easily get to using conventional cleaning tools

General purpose brush head: All round cleaning, for dashboards, wheels and other surfaces. Wide brush head: Wide surface area for carpets and upholstery. Soft brush head: Gentle cleaning, for removing bugs and tar spots from paintwork Tough brush head: Tough cleaning, for wheels and engines.
Ergonomic handle which is comfortable to hold, and the sonic vibrations won't tire you out. Splashproof allowing it to be used with detergents Includes 4 X AA Batteries
